creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Mon Apr  7 10:13:03 2014
New Revision: 350451
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/350451
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r350451/

Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  
  PR:		188311
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/www/p5-Catalyst-Controller-BindLex/Makefile

Modified: head/www/p5-Catalyst-Controller-BindLex/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/p5-Catalyst-Controller-BindLex/Makefile	Mon Apr  7 10:12:58 2014	(r350450)
+++ head/www/p5-Catalyst-Controller-BindLex/Makefile	Mon Apr  7 10:13:03 2014	(r350451)
@@ -8,9 +8,12 @@ MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	CPAN:NUFFIN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Stash your lexical goodness
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-Catalyst-Runtime>=0:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-Catalyst-Runtime \
 		p5-Array-RefElem>=0:${PORTSDIR}/misc/p5-Array-RefElem \
 		p5-Devel-Caller>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Devel-Caller \
